purpose: record which main ideas are implemented, partly implemented, not yet implemented, and what major research and execution steps have already happened so future work does not repeat them
main_bottleneck: supervision target quality and selective ambiguity handling for next-step branch allocation
highest_priority_implemented_line: branch-level value plus uncertainty plus derived compare/defer
not_yet_fully_implemented_but_promising: hybrid listwise or frontier-level primary supervision
main_process_conclusion: the repository is now in the decide-current-ideas phase rather than the find-more-ideas phase
